evals.prompt: Document the architecture of our payments service using arc42.
evals.expected_output: An arc42 document covering the 12 standard sections for the payments service.
expectations: Includes all 12 arc42 sections in order (Introduction & Goals through Glossary)
Section 9 captures architecture decisions, section 10 captures quality requirements
Emits MIF frontmatter with type: semantic and passes mif-validate --level 1
Contains substantive content per section, not 'TBD' placeholders

evals.prompt: Our arc42 doc only has an intro and some diagrams. What's missing?
evals.expected_output: Identifies the absent arc42 sections and explains what each should contain.
expectations: Lists the missing sections among the 12 (e.g., constraints, solution strategy, crosscutting, risks)
Explains the purpose of each missing section

evals.prompt: Where do architecture decisions and quality scenarios go in arc42?
evals.expected_output: Explains section 9 (Architecture Decisions) and section 10 (Quality Requirements).
